hero.subheading: We provide safe and efficient transport of goods across Europe and beyond. With over 25 years of experience, we are your trusted logistics partner.

about.heading: About MultiSped
about.body: MultiSped as a company is dedicated to delivering secure transport in the safest and fastest possible way. Our warehouses and developed network of road, maritime, rail, and container transport operates in dynamic cohesion so your shipments arrive at the desired destination without any issues. We carry out international goods transport at competitive prices based on current market conditions. The quality of our services is always at the highest level.

truck.title: Road Freight
truck.body: We organize and carry out mass transport with all types of trucks.
truck.detail: We transport goods in bulk using tipper trucks according to daily needs or a pre-announced delivery schedule with maximum quantities of up to 3,000 tons per day. The most commonly transported goods are coal, ores, FeSi, salt, grain, and other commodities.

maritime.title: Maritime-Container Transport
maritime.body: Ship equipment, storage, and safekeeping of goods are handled through our partners at major European ports.
maritime.detail: We organize FCL and LCL container transport, container booking, preparation of all documentation for maritime transport, and customs clearance of goods for import and export.

rail.title: Rail Freight
rail.body: We transport scheduled trains and individual shipments daily to and from all railway stations.
rail.detail: Rail transport is ideal for large volumes on long-distance destinations. We offer intermodal solutions combining rail and road for optimal efficiency and reduced carbon footprint.

serviceItems.heading: Service Items
serviceItems.subheading: Our mission is to turn logistics challenges into your competitive advantage through expert representation, safe storage, and efficient distribution of your products.

item1.title: Customs Formalities
item1.description: Full mediation in all import and export customs procedures for uninterrupted flow of your goods.

item2.title: Special Transport & Permits
item2.description: Complete organization of oversized transport with appropriate technical equipment and logistics support.

item3.title: Simplified Customs Procedures
item3.description: Application of simplified procedures for significantly speeding up the customs clearance process.

item4.title: Goods Origin Department
item4.description: Expert assistance in defining the preferential and non-preferential origin of your products.

item5.title: Warehousing Services
item5.description: Complete inventory management, labeling, and preparation of shipments for further distribution.

item6.title: Own Customs Warehouse
item6.description: Safe and efficient storage of your goods in modernly equipped facilities with 24/7 video surveillance.

sectors.heading: Our Key Sectors
sectors.subheading: An overview of the organizational units that drive our services. With dedication to precision and reliability, we offer complete solutions tailored to your specific business needs.

logistics.label: Transport Network / Global Distribution
logistics.heading: Logistics
logistics.body: Years of experience and a specialized team of employees offer a high level of logistics services. Logistics solutions based on experience, trust, and cost-effectiveness provide a tremendous advantage in meeting client needs. We perform all types of transport, from bulk shipments to consolidated loads, and offer 24-hour vehicle tracking, ensuring our clients are satisfied with our accuracy, responsibility, and efficiency.

commercial.label: Commercial Operations / Client Support
commercial.heading: Commercial
commercial.body: This department is responsible for providing cost-effective and reliable solutions to its clients in meeting their needs and requirements. It tracks client shipments, ensuring their timely and safe arrival to any destination, regardless of the type of transport.

finance.label: Financial Management / Foreign Exchange
finance.heading: Finance
finance.body: Monitoring obligations and receivables with partner companies and complete foreign exchange operations in international trade. Strategic principles include quality service execution, continuous investment, and nurturing good relations with companies with whom we have long-term agreements. Every employee is obligated to perform their duties with quality, thoroughness, timeliness, efficiency, and at the lowest possible cost.

partners.heading: Companies That Trust Us
partners.subheading: Long-term partnerships built on trust and quality

map.heading: Connected Across Europe
map.description: Our network of partners and transport routes covers over 25 European countries, ensuring fast and reliable delivery to every destination.

contact.heading: Let's build a successful partnership together.
contact.subheading: We are here to help with all your requests related to transport, customs, and warehousing. Share your needs and we will offer an efficient solution tailored to your business.
contact.name: Name
contact.title: Subject

footer.tagline: Logistics that drives your business forward.

missionVision.missionBody: MultiSped strives to set a new standard of quality in courier services on the Macedonian market. With a young and motivated team, we aim to build lasting value through continuous improvement of our services, expanding our network, and maintaining strong partnerships with our clients. The values we nurture are, above all, professionalism, adherence to high ethical standards, and mutual trust with our clients.
missionVision.visionBody: Our vision is to become synonymous with quality service, creating new trends and standards in both the business and everyday life.
